name: WeatherAPI
description: WeatherAPI provides real-time and forecast weather data, astronomy data, time zone information, sports data, marine weather, air quality, and location search for any place in the world. Supports current conditions, forecasts up to 14 days, historical weather since 2010, IP lookup, and autocomplete search.

capabilities.name: weather_current_get
capabilities.description: Get real-time weather conditions for a location.

capabilities.name: weather_forecast_get
capabilities.description: Get weather forecast for up to 14 days with hourly breakdowns.

capabilities.name: weather_history_get
capabilities.description: Get historical weather data for a specific past date.

capabilities.name: weather_future_get
capabilities.description: Get future weather data for a date up to 300 days ahead.

capabilities.name: weather_marine_get
capabilities.description: Get marine/ocean weather data with tide information.

capabilities.name: location_search
capabilities.description: Search for locations with autocomplete support.

capabilities.name: location_ip_lookup
capabilities.description: Get location information from an IP address.

capabilities.name: astronomy_get
capabilities.description: Get astronomical data: sunrise, sunset, moonrise, moonset, moon phase.

capabilities.name: timezone_get
capabilities.description: Get timezone and local time for a location.

capabilities.name: sports_get
capabilities.description: Get sports event suitability based on weather conditions.
